instruction: Within the time range of March 7, 2021, from 16:00 to 16:30, there were two failures detected in the system. You are tasked with identifying, for EACH failure, the root cause component, the root cause occurrence datetime, and the root cause reason.
groundtruth:
answer 1: component=MG01; reason=network latency; datetime=2021-03-07 16:08:00
answer 2: component=Tomcat04; reason=network packet loss; datetime=2021-03-07 16:29:00
scoring_points:
The 1-th root cause occurrence time is within 1 minutes (i.e., <=1min) of 2021-03-07 16:08:00
The 2-th root cause occurrence time is within 1 minutes (i.e., <=1min) of 2021-03-07 16:29:00
